_note: Rough buildout from mattfryed.com/massive. Copy + credits are Matt's own; images referenced by URL from his Squarespace CDN (swap to repo/own-host later). Node geometry + colours match the live homepage roster (P-02). Sample-grade structure pending Matt's review.
name: MASSIVE

intro.title: CLASSIFICATION
intro.body:
MASSIVE is a two-player arcade game about the transfer of matter between the environment and the players. The goal is to transfer the most matter to your goal — by absorbing it from your opponent and collecting free-floating nuggets.

A freestanding cabinet designed, fabricated, and developed in-studio. Built 2020; currently residing at Wonderville, Brooklyn.

nodes.label: Game Design & Development
nodes.blurb: The two-player matter-transfer game — absorb, collect, and feed your goal.

columns.name: Loop
columns.body: Pull matter off your opponent, sweep up free-floating nuggets, and bank the most into your goal to win the round.

blocks.title: THE GAME
blocks.body: Two players fight over a shared pool of matter. Everything on screen is mass that can be moved — taken from the other player, scavenged from the field, and carried home. The cabinet was built around that simple, greedy loop and the crowd it draws.

nodes.label: Quantum & Macro Physics Simulations
nodes.blurb: Matter as the medium — every pixel on screen is mass you can move.

blocks.title: MATTER MODEL
blocks.body: The whole field is a matter economy — particles flow, clump, and get pulled between goals under a continuous simulation. Absorbing your opponent grows your reach; over-extending leaves you thin and exposed.

images.caption: On-screen state — two goals, one shared pool.

nodes.label: Cabinet fabrication & Design
nodes.blurb: The freestanding enclosure — built in-studio, toured to MAGFest.

blocks.title: THE CABINET
blocks.body: A freestanding two-player upright, designed and fabricated in-studio around the game's shared-screen layout. Built to take a crowd and travel — shown at MAGFest 2020 and now resident at Wonderville.

nodes.label: Visual Identity System
nodes.blurb: Title treatment and event artwork around the cabinet.

blocks.title: EVENT ARTWORK
blocks.caption: Launch artwork — the title system carried onto event posters.

nodes.label: SFX & BGM
nodes.blurb: Original score and sound by Devin Curry / Grand Atrium.
